TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Mu-han-muo-de. Ha-sang. A-hung-de Á©ÜÁĹēťĽėŚĺ∑¬∑Śďąś°Ď¬∑ťėŅśī™Śĺ∑ == Mu-han-muo-de. Ha-sang. A-hung-de " pu-se-tu kamu :ŔÖŔĄōß ŔÖō≠ŔÖōĮ ō≠ō≥ŔÜ ōßōģŔąŔÜōĮ), u A-hu-han maw-la atu Ta-li-pan nu sakakaay a tahudan, pilecuhan i Pu-se-tu tademaw i ka-ka-e-niyadu'an. A-hu-han Yi-se-lan tumuk. tuseptucay mihcaan siwa a bulad malaA-hung-de-A-hu-han Cung-li. . nikaudipan ÁĒüŚĻ≥ caay katinengi ku pilecuhan. saan ku Lein-he-kuo-Aan-li-huy a nicudadan, hakiya itida i caysiwsiplim mihcaan katukuh i caysiwlimsep mihcaan hakiya i caysiwlimlim mihcaan katukuh i caysiwlimwal mihcaan a nilecuhan itida i A-hu-han-kan-ce-ta-ha-sen a Pen-cie-wa-yi niyadu'an " aydaay nu Ca-li niyadu'an", saan namaka A-hu-han-tu-lan-ni-wan-caw nu patidengay ci Ay-ha-may-de-sa. Tu-lan-ni a ilucan. . wawa henay ci A-hung-de micudad i A-hu-han a yadahay nu kiwsama nu cacudadan. malaTa-li-pan nu babalaki, cinida u Ta-li-pan sayaway tu nu mililiday a tademaw ci Mu-han-muo-de. Aw-ma-e a sakapahay nu cabayan. sayaway nida malaTa-li-pan mililiday sa itida i " caysiwsiwnem mihcaan katuku i tusepsepcay mihcaan", ci A-hung-de nami kawaw tu Hu-way-ceng, Hu-cung-li a kawawan. Talipan mapabelintu tu tusaay a bataan sa, ci A-hung-de u Kuy-ta-su-la a tademaw, tusepcaylu mihcaan mala Ta-li-pan sakakaay mililiday nu wi-yun-huy ni kaputan atu mialaay tu tademaw nu mikawaway a tademaw. dayhan " midiputay tu sakatalawan a tademawan", ci A-hung-de atu duma nu Ta-li-pan nu mililiday a tademaw puluan nu Len-he-kuo. . tuseptucay mihcaan siwa bulad pitu demiad, ina Ta-li-pan mihapu musakamu a patideng tu pilinzian nu si-hu, hedekan tu nina A-hu-han tut ulu a pilipayan nu kainai'an nu sihuan, ci A-hun-de pangangan han u midayliay nu Cung-li. 2021ŚĻī9śúą7śó•, . sakay cen-ce a kawaw sa, ci A-hung-de u Yi-se-lan-ciaw tu a sitangahay nu micudaday, yadah ku nipatahekalan nida tu sakay kamisama nu cudadan. sakakaay nu A-hu-han, u aydaay nu A-hu-han Ta-li-pan sihu nu sakakaay. tusepcaysip mihcaan, A-hu-han Yi-se-lan kun-he-kuo patideng tu baluhay mahida u Cung-li nu sin-cen sakakaay, atu A-hu-han Cung-tung sihuan nu sakakaay a sikinlian, tuseptusep mihcaan lu bulad caysiw demiad tatenga lawpesen. namaka A-hu-han Yi-se-lan tumukan nu kanatalan itida i tuseptucay mihcaan malingatu a patideng, namaka A-hu-han sihu nikalekalan tu tusepsepcay mihcaan sa nipalawpesan a Cung-li nu kawawan. A-hu-han likisi ťėŅŚĮĆśĪóś≠∑ŚŹ≤ saan ku nikaadihan nu sumamad, makatukuh ayda makaala tu lima a wangan nu tademaw idaw tu ku muenengay itida i A-hu-han, A-hu-han hinapanganganan tu Cung-ya a ziwzilu an, ya likisi nu heni yadah ku lepacaw atu caay kasasukapah ku siy-kay. itini nu likisian, nina nipanganganan tu A-hu-han a niyadu'an itini i masazitayzitayay nu yadahay tu ngangan nu Ti-kuo a lilisan, angangan han idaw ku Puo-se-ti-kuo, Kun-cie-wan-caw, Yi-sung-wan-caw, Tang-caw, Mum-u-e-ti-kuo, Cin-caw atu Ta-ing-ti-kuo, duma satu pasuCen-ci-se-han atu Ya-li-san-ta ta-ti-kuo nipatidenagn a Ta-ti-kuo. . itini i hatiniay tu nu tenesan nu likisi, yadah tu ku nikaydaan nu A-hu-han tu nipidebungan atu nipialawan, misakaput ku itidaay a hitay tu tabakiay nu hitayan, midebung tu tapiingan nanay nuheni a kanatal, mala manatal. Ci Ay-ha-may-de.Tu-lan-ni itida i caywal seci nu teban, tapideng tu cacayay nu suo-tuan itida i Kan-ta-ha a tabakiay a kanatalan, u Tu-lan-ni kanatal han. kilul sa, u lala' nu kanatal sipakelap i tapiingan nu kanatalan. itida i caysiw se-ci an, ina A-hu-han mala Ing-kuo atu E-luo-se kanatal nu sapihabelutan a kitidaan. .
S.PHON: == mu-ńßan-muo-d…ô. ńßa-saŇč. a-ńßuŇč-d…ô *********** == mu-ńßan-muo-d…ô. ńßa-saŇč. a-ńßuŇč-d…ô " pu-s…ô-tu kamu :*** **** *** *****), u a-ńßu-ńßan maw-r~…ĺa atu ta-r~…ĺi-pan nu sakakaaj a tańßudan, pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i pu-s…ô-tu tad…ômaw i ka-ka-…ô-nijadu Ē~ °an. a-ńßu-ńßan ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan tumuk. tus…ôptu ¶aj mińß ¶aan siwa a bur~…ĺad mar~…ĺaa-ńßuŇč-d…ô-a-ńßu-ńßan ¶uŇč-r~…ĺi. . nikaudipan ** ¶aaj katin…ôŇči ku pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan. saan ku r~…ĺ…ôin-ńß…ô-kuo-aan-r~…ĺi-ńßuj a ni ¶udadan, ńßakija itida i ¶ajsiwsipr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan katukuńß i ¶ajsiwr~…ĺims…ôp mińß ¶aan ńßakija i ¶ajsiwr~…ĺimr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan katukuńß i ¶ajsiwr~…ĺimwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aan a nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan itida i a-ńßu-ńßan-kan- ¶…ô-ta-ńßa-s…ôn a p…ôn- ¶i…ô-wa-ji nijadu Ē~ °an " ajdaaj nu ¶a-r~…ĺi nijadu Ē~ °an", saan namaka a-ńßu-ńßan-tu-r~…ĺan-ni-wan- ¶aw nu patid…ôŇčaj ¶i aj-ńßa-maj-d…ô-sa. tu-r~…ĺan-ni a ir~…ĺu ¶an. . wawa ńß…ônaj ¶i a-ńßuŇč-d…ô mi ¶udad i a-ńßu-ńßan a jadańßaj nu kiwsama nu ¶a ¶udadan. mar~…ĺata-r~…ĺi-pan nu babar~…ĺaki, ¶inida u ta-r~…ĺi-pan sajawaj tu nu mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj a tad…ômaw ¶i mu-ńßan-muo-d…ô. aw-ma-…ô a sakapańßaj nu ¶abajan. sajawaj nida mar~…ĺata-r~…ĺi-pan mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj sa itida i " ¶ajsiwsiwn…ôm mińß ¶aan katuku i tus…ôps…ôp ¶aj mińß ¶aan", ¶i a-ńßuŇč-d…ô nami kawaw tu ńßu-waj- ¶…ôŇč, ńßu- ¶uŇč-r~…ĺi a kawawan. tar~…ĺipan mapab…ôr~…ĺintu tu tusaaj a bataan sa, ¶i a-ńßuŇč-d…ô u kuj-ta-su-r~…ĺa a tad…ômaw, tus…ôp ¶ajr~…ĺu mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa ta-r~…ĺi-pan sakakaaj mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj nu wi-jun-ńßuj ni kaputan atu miar~…ĺaaj tu tad…ômaw nu mikawawaj a tad…ômaw. dajńßan " midiputaj tu sakatar~…ĺawan a tad…ômawan", ¶i a-ńßuŇč-d…ô atu duma nu ta-r~…ĺi-pan nu mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj a tad…ômaw pur~…ĺuan nu r~…ĺ…ôn-ńß…ô-kuo. . tus…ôptu ¶aj mińß ¶aan siwa bur~…ĺad pitu d…ômiad, ina ta-r~…ĺi-pan mińßapu musakamu a patid…ôŇč tu pir~…ĺinzian nu si-ńßu, ńß…ôd…ôkan tu nina a-ńßu-ńßan tut ur~…ĺu a pir~…ĺipajan nu kainai Ē~ °an nu sińßuan, ¶i a-ńßun-d…ô paŇčaŇčan ńßan u midajr~…ĺiaj nu ¶uŇč-r~…ĺi. *********, . sakaj ¶…ôn- ¶…ô a kawaw sa, ¶i a-ńßuŇč-d…ô u ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan- ¶iaw tu a sitaŇčańßaj nu mi ¶udadaj, jadańß ku nipatańß…ôkar~…ĺan nida tu sakaj kamisama nu ¶udadan. sakakaaj nu a-ńßu-ńßan, u ajdaaj nu a-ńßu-ńßan ta-r~…ĺi-pan sińßu nu sakakaaj. tus…ôp ¶ajsip mińß ¶aan, a-ńßu-ńßan ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan kun-ńß…ô-kuo patid…ôŇč tu bar~…ĺuńßaj mańßida u ¶uŇč-r~…ĺi nu sin- ¶…ôn sakakaaj, atu a-ńßu-ńßan ¶uŇč-tuŇč sińßuan nu sakakaaj a sikinr~…ĺian, tus…ôptus…ôp mińß ¶aan r~…ĺu bur~…ĺad ¶ajsiw d…ômiad tat…ôŇča r~…ĺawp…ôs…ôn. namaka a-ńßu-ńßan ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan tumukan nu kanatar~…ĺan itida i tus…ôptu ¶aj mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu a patid…ôŇč, namaka a-ńßu-ńßan sińßu nikar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan tu tus…ôps…ôp ¶aj mińß ¶aan sa nipar~…ĺawp…ôsan a ¶uŇč-r~…ĺi nu kawawan. a-ńßu-ńßan r~…ĺikisi ***** saan ku nikaadińßan nu sumamad, makatukuńß ajda makaar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺima a waŇčan nu tad…ômaw idaw tu ku mu…ôn…ôŇčaj itida i a-ńßu-ńßan, a-ńßu-ńßan ńßinapaŇčaŇčanan tu ¶uŇč-ja a ziwzir~…ĺu an, ja r~…ĺikisi nu ńß…ôni jadańß ku r~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw atu ¶aaj kasasukapańß ku sij-kaj. itini nu r~…ĺikisian, nina nipaŇčaŇčanan tu a-ńßu-ńßan a nijadu Ē~ °an itini i masazitajzitajaj nu jadańßaj tu ŇčaŇčan nu ti-kuo a r~…ĺir~…ĺisan, aŇčaŇčan ńßan idaw ku puo-s…ô-ti-kuo, kun- ¶i…ô-wan- ¶aw, ji-suŇč-wan- ¶aw, taŇč- ¶aw, mum-u-…ô-ti-kuo, ¶in- ¶aw atu ta-iŇč-ti-kuo, duma satu pasu ¶…ôn- ¶i-s…ô-ńßan atu ja-r~…ĺi-san-ta ta-ti-kuo nipatid…ônagn a ta-ti-kuo. . itini i ńßatiniaj tu nu t…ôn…ôsan nu r~…ĺikisi, jadańß tu ku nikajdaan nu a-ńßu-ńßan tu nipid…ôbuŇčan atu nipiar~…ĺawan, misakaput ku itidaaj a ńßitaj tu tabakiaj nu ńßitajan, mid…ôbuŇč tu tapiiŇčan nanaj nuńß…ôni a kanatar~…ĺ, mar~…ĺa manatar~…ĺ. ¶i aj-ńßa-maj-d…ô.tu-r~…ĺan-ni itida i ¶ajwar~…ĺ s…ô ¶i nu t…ôban, tapid…ôŇč tu ¶a ¶ajaj nu suo-tuan itida i kan-ta-ńßa a tabakiaj a kanatar~…ĺan, u tu-r~…ĺan-ni kanatar~…ĺ ńßan. kir~…ĺur~…ĺ sa, u r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nu kanatar~…ĺ sipak…ôr~…ĺap i tapiiŇčan nu kanatar~…ĺan. itida i ¶ajsiw s…ô- ¶i an, ina a-ńßu-ńßan mar~…ĺa iŇč-kuo atu …ô-r~…ĺuo-s…ô kanatar~…ĺ nu sapińßab…ôr~…ĺutan a kitidaan. .
S.FORM: == Mu-han-muo-de. Ha-sang. A-hung-de Á©ÜÁĹēťĽėŚĺ∑¬∑Śďąś°Ď¬∑ťėŅśī™Śĺ∑ == Mu-han-muo-de. Ha-sang. A-hung-de " pu-se-tu kamu :ŔÖŔĄōß ŔÖō≠ŔÖōĮ ō≠ō≥ŔÜ ōßōģŔąŔÜōĮ), u A-hu-han maw-la atu Ta-li-pan nu sakakaay a tahudan, pilecuhan i Pu-se-tu tademaw i ka-ka-e-niyadu'an. A-hu-han Yi-se-lan tumuk. tuseptucay mihcaan siwa a bulad malaA-hung-de-A-hu-han Cung-li. . nikaudipan ÁĒüŚĻ≥ caay katinengi ku pilecuhan. saan ku Lein-he-kuo-Aan-li-huy a nicudadan, hakiya itida i caysiwsiplim mihcaan katukuh i caysiwlimsep mihcaan hakiya i caysiwlimlim mihcaan katukuh i caysiwlimwal mihcaan a nilecuhan itida i A-hu-han-kan-ce-ta-ha-sen a Pen-cie-wa-yi niyadu'an " aydaay nu Ca-li niyadu'an", saan namaka A-hu-han-tu-lan-ni-wan-caw nu patidengay ci Ay-ha-may-de-sa. Tu-lan-ni a ilucan. . wawa henay ci A-hung-de micudad i A-hu-han a yadahay nu kiwsama nu cacudadan. malaTa-li-pan nu babalaki, cinida u Ta-li-pan sayaway tu nu mililiday a tademaw ci Mu-han-muo-de. Aw-ma-e a sakapahay nu cabayan. sayaway nida malaTa-li-pan mililiday sa itida i " caysiwsiwnem mihcaan katuku i tusepsepcay mihcaan", ci A-hung-de nami kawaw tu Hu-way-ceng, Hu-cung-li a kawawan. Talipan mapabelintu tu tusaay a bataan sa, ci A-hung-de u Kuy-ta-su-la a tademaw, tusepcaylu mihcaan mala Ta-li-pan sakakaay mililiday nu wi-yun-huy ni kaputan atu mialaay tu tademaw nu mikawaway a tademaw. dayhan " midiputay tu sakatalawan a tademawan", ci A-hung-de atu duma nu Ta-li-pan nu mililiday a tademaw puluan nu Len-he-kuo. . tuseptucay mihcaan siwa bulad pitu demiad, ina Ta-li-pan mihapu musakamu a patideng tu pilinzian nu si-hu, hedekan tu nina A-hu-han tut ulu a pilipayan nu kainai'an nu sihuan, ci A-hun-de pangangan han u midayliay nu Cung-li. 2021ŚĻī9śúą7śó•, . sakay cen-ce a kawaw sa, ci A-hung-de u Yi-se-lan-ciaw tu a sitangahay nu micudaday, yadah ku nipatahekalan nida tu sakay kamisama nu cudadan. sakakaay nu A-hu-han, u aydaay nu A-hu-han Ta-li-pan sihu nu sakakaay. tusepcaysip mihcaan, A-hu-han Yi-se-lan kun-he-kuo patideng tu baluhay mahida u Cung-li nu sin-cen sakakaay, atu A-hu-han Cung-tung sihuan nu sakakaay a sikinlian, tuseptusep mihcaan lu bulad caysiw demiad tatenga lawpesen. namaka A-hu-han Yi-se-lan tumukan nu kanatalan itida i tuseptucay mihcaan malingatu a patideng, namaka A-hu-han sihu nikalekalan tu tusepsepcay mihcaan sa nipalawpesan a Cung-li nu kawawan. A-hu-han likisi ťėŅŚĮĆśĪóś≠∑ŚŹ≤ saan ku nikaadihan nu sumamad, makatukuh ayda makaala tu lima a wangan nu tademaw idaw tu ku muenengay itida i A-hu-han, A-hu-han hinapanganganan tu Cung-ya a ziwzilu an, ya likisi nu heni yadah ku lepacaw atu caay kasasukapah ku siy-kay. itini nu likisian, nina nipanganganan tu A-hu-han a niyadu'an itini i masazitayzitayay nu yadahay tu ngangan nu Ti-kuo a lilisan, angangan han idaw ku Puo-se-ti-kuo, Kun-cie-wan-caw, Yi-sung-wan-caw, Tang-caw, Mum-u-e-ti-kuo, Cin-caw atu Ta-ing-ti-kuo, duma satu pasuCen-ci-se-han atu Ya-li-san-ta ta-ti-kuo nipatidenagn a Ta-ti-kuo. . itini i hatiniay tu nu tenesan nu likisi, yadah tu ku nikaydaan nu A-hu-han tu nipidebungan atu nipialawan, misakaput ku itidaay a hitay tu tabakiay nu hitayan, midebung tu tapiingan nanay nuheni a kanatal, mala manatal. Ci Ay-ha-may-de.Tu-lan-ni itida i caywal seci nu teban, tapideng tu cacayay nu suo-tuan itida i Kan-ta-ha a tabakiay a kanatalan, u Tu-lan-ni kanatal han. kilul sa, u lala' nu kanatal sipakelap i tapiingan nu kanatalan. itida i caysiw se-ci an, ina A-hu-han mala Ing-kuo atu E-luo-se kanatal nu sapihabelutan a kitidaan. .

kamisama nu ¶udadan. sakakaaj nu a-ńßu-ńßan, u ajdaaj nu a-ńßu-ńßan ta-r~…ĺi-pan sińßu nu sakakaaj. tus…ôp ¶ajsip mińß ¶aan, a-ńßu-ńßan ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan kun-ńß…ô-kuo patid…ôŇč tu bar~…ĺuńßaj mańßida u ¶uŇč-r~…ĺi nu sin- ¶…ôn sakakaaj, atu a-ńßu-ńßan ¶uŇč-tuŇč sińßuan nu sakakaaj a sikinr~…ĺian, tus…ôptus…ôp mińß ¶aan r~…ĺu bur~…ĺad ¶ajsiw d…ômiad tat…ôŇča r~…ĺawp…ôs…ôn. namaka a-ńßu-ńßan ji-s…ô-r~…ĺan tumukan nu kanatar~…ĺan itida i tus…ôptu ¶aj mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu a patid…ôŇč, namaka a-ńßu-ńßan sińßu nikar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan tu tus…ôps…ôp ¶aj mińß ¶aan sa nipar~…ĺawp…ôsan a ¶uŇč-r~…ĺi nu kawawan. a-ńßu-ńßan r~…ĺikisi ***** saan ku nikaadińßan nu sumamad, makatukuńß ajda makaar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺima a waŇčan nu tad…ômaw idaw tu ku mu…ôn…ôŇčaj itida i a-ńßu-ńßan, a-ńßu-ńßan ńßinapaŇčaŇčanan tu ¶uŇč-ja a ziwzir~…ĺu an, ja r~…ĺikisi nu ńß…ôni jadańß ku r~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw atu ¶aaj kasasukapańß ku sij-kaj. itini nu r~…ĺikisian, nina nipaŇčaŇčanan tu a-ńßu-ńßan a nijadu Ē~ °an itini i masazitajzitajaj nu jadańßaj tu ŇčaŇčan nu ti-kuo a r~…ĺir~…ĺisan, aŇčaŇčan ńßan idaw ku puo-s…ô-ti-kuo, kun- ¶i…ô-wan- ¶aw, ji-suŇč-wan- ¶aw, taŇč- ¶aw, mum-u-…ô-ti-kuo, ¶in- ¶aw atu ta-iŇč-ti-kuo, duma satu pasu ¶…ôn- ¶i-s…ô-ńßan atu ja-r~…ĺi-san-ta ta-ti-kuo nipatid…ônagn a ta-ti-kuo. . itini i ńßatiniaj tu nu t…ôn…ôsan nu r~…ĺikisi, jadańß tu ku nikajdaan nu a-ńßu-ńßan tu nipid…ôbuŇčan atu nipiar~…ĺawan, misakaput ku itidaaj a ńßitaj tu tabakiaj nu ńßitajan, mid…ôbuŇč tu tapiiŇčan nanaj nuńß…ôni a kanatar~…ĺ, mar~…ĺa manatar~…ĺ. ¶i aj-ńßa-maj-d…ô.tu-r~…ĺan-ni itida i ¶ajwar~…ĺ s…ô ¶i nu t…ôban, tapid…ôŇč tu ¶a ¶ajaj nu suo-tuan itida i kan-ta-ńßa a tabakiaj a kanatar~…ĺan, u tu-r~…ĺan-ni kanatar~…ĺ ńßan. kir~…ĺur~…ĺ sa, u r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nu kanatar~…ĺ sipak…ôr~…ĺap i tapiiŇčan nu kanatar~…ĺan. itida i ¶ajsiw s…ô- ¶i an, ina a-ńßu-ńßan mar~…ĺa iŇč-kuo atu …ô-r~…ĺuo-s…ô kanatar~…ĺ nu sapińßab…ôr~…ĺutan a kitidaan. .
